
---
title: "Fei Qin"
image: "files/profile_pic.jpg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:f1qin@ucsd.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/your_username
---

## 👋 Hello!

Welcome to my personal website.

I'm **Fei Qin**, a student passionate about **Supply Chain Management** and **Data Analysis**.  
I enjoy exploring how data-driven insights can improve business decisions and efficiency.

---

## 🚀 What I Do

- 📊 Data analysis and visualization  
- 📦 Supply chain optimization  
- 💡 Business problem solving  

---

## 📌 About This Site

This website is built using **Quarto** and customized with my own styling and content.
